socialProof.quote: Markets, monetary policy, geopolitics, energy — everything moves together now. I needed something that showed me how these forces connect in real time, not just the headlines but the underlying drivers.

proShowcase.title: Your AI Analyst That Never Sleeps
proShowcase.subtitle: The free dashboard shows you the world. Pro gives you an analyst to ask, a digest you subscribe to, and primitives to build on. Stocks, macro, geopolitical risk — and the connections between them.
proShowcase.equityResearchDesc: Global stock analysis with financials visualization, analyst price targets, and valuation metrics. Track what moves markets.
proShowcase.geopoliticalAnalysisDesc: Grand Chessboard strategic framework, Prisoners of Geography models, and central bank & monetary policy tracking.
proShowcase.economyAnalyticsDesc: GDP, inflation, interest rates, and growth cycles. Macro data correlated with market signals and geopolitical events.
proShowcase.riskMonitoringDesc: Global risk scoring, scenario analysis, and geopolitical risk assessment. Convergence detection across market and political signals.
proShowcase.orbitalSurveillanceDesc: (Soon) Overhead pass predictions, revisit frequency analysis, and imaging window alerts. Know when intelligence satellites are watching your areas of interest.
proShowcase.morningBriefsDesc: Up to 30 ranked stories per digest, deduped across 500+ sources. Pick daily, twice-daily, or weekly cadence — or real-time alerts for critical events. AI Assessment and Signals to watch delivered to Slack, Discord, Telegram, Email, or webhook. Not a newsletter — an analyst.
proShowcase.oneKeyDesc: Finnhub, FRED, ACLED, UCDP, NASA FIRMS, AISStream, OpenSky, and more — all active, no separate registrations.

enterpriseShowcase.dataLayersDesc: Tens of thousands of infrastructure assets mapped globally. Satellite imagery integration with change detection and SAR.
enterpriseShowcase.connectorsDesc: PostgreSQL, Snowflake, Splunk, Sentinel, Jira, Slack, Teams, and more. Export to PDF, PowerPoint, CSV, GeoJSON.
enterpriseShowcase.whiteLabelDesc: Your brand, your domain, your desktop app. Android TV app for SOC walls and trading floors. Embeddable iframe panels.
enterpriseShowcase.financialDesc: Earnings calendar, energy grid data, enhanced commodity tracking with cargo inference, sanctions screening with AIS correlation.
enterpriseShowcase.commodityDesc: Vessel tracking + cargo inference + supply chain graph. Know before the market moves.
enterpriseShowcase.governmentDesc: Air-gapped, AI agents, full situational awareness, MCP. No data leaves your network.
enterpriseShowcase.riskDesc: Scenario simulation, investor personas, branded PDF/PowerPoint reports on demand.
enterpriseShowcase.socDesc: Cyber threat layer, SIEM integration, BGP anomaly monitoring, ransomware feeds.

pricingTable.title: Compare Tiers
pricingTable.noteBelow: The core platform remains free. Paid plans unlock equity research, macro analytics, AI briefings, and organizational use.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes. The core platform remains free. Pro adds equity research, macro analytics, and AI briefings. Enterprise adds team deployments and TV apps.
faq.a2: Pro is for investors, analysts, and professionals who want stock monitoring, geopolitical analysis, economy analytics, and AI-powered daily briefings — all under one key.
faq.a3: Enterprise is for teams that need shared use, APIs, integrations, deployment options, and direct support.
faq.q4: Can I start with Pro and upgrade later?
faq.a4: Yes. Pro works for serious individuals. Enterprise is there when team and deployment needs grow.
faq.q5: Is this only for conflict monitoring?
faq.a5: No. World Monitor is primarily a global intelligence platform covering stock markets, macroeconomics, geopolitical analysis, energy, infrastructure, and more. Conflict tracking is one of many capabilities — not the focus.
faq.q6: Why keep the core platform free?
faq.a6: Because public access matters. Paid plans fund deeper workflows for serious users and organizations.
faq.q7: Can I still use my own API keys?
faq.a7: Yes. Bring-your-own-keys always works. Pro simply means you don't have to register for 20+ separate services.
faq.a8: MCP lets AI agents — Claude, GPT, custom LLMs — use WorldMonitor as a tool, querying all 30+ services. Included in Pro. Enterprise adds private MCP servers and custom deployments.
faq.q9: Can I build my own panels?
faq.a9: Yes. Pro includes the Custom Widget Builder — build panels from HTML, CSS, and JavaScript, with AI-assisted modification.
faq.q10: Can I connect Claude or GPT to WorldMonitor?
faq.a10: Yes. MCP is included in Pro — plug WorldMonitor into Claude, GPT, or any MCP-compatible LLM as a live tool.
faq.a11: Pick your cadence — daily, twice-daily, or weekly. We re-score every tracked story against your alert rules and watchlist, dedupe across 500+ sources, and send up to 30 ranked items with an AI Assessment and Signals to watch written to your context. Real-time alerts are also available for critical events.
faq.a12: Near real time for Pro. 5–15 minutes on Free.
faq.a13: Notification channels are AES-256 encrypted at rest. Digests never leave our pipeline unredacted.

finalCta.title: Start with Pro. Scale to Enterprise.
finalCta.subtitle: Keep using World Monitor for free, or upgrade for equity research, macro analytics, and AI briefings. If your organization needs team access, TV apps, or API support, talk to us.
